title: Sass & Belle Yellow Glass Bud Vases - Set of 3 - Small Glass Vases for Table Decoration, Mini Flower Vase for Home, Table Decor, Sass and Belle Decorative Design
features: Stylish Yellow Glass Vase Set – This set of three Sass & Belle bud vases is perfect for adding a touch of colour to your space. Each mini glass vase features a unique shape and embossed design, ideal for showcasing single blooms or small floral arrangements.

Versatile Table Decorations – These small glass vases are ideal for vases for flowers or decorative accents in the kitchen, living room, or dining table. Great as table decor for parties, events, or everyday style at home.

Perfect for Flower Vase Lovers – Whether used as a flower vase or accent piece, the translucent yellow glass adds charm. These bud vases are an excellent way to display seasonal flowers or dried arrangements.

Compact and Functional Design – Each vase is compact and suitable for small spaces, making them ideal small vases for table decoration, mini centrepieces, or shelf styling. Lightweight and easy to move around.

A Sass & Belle Favourite – These decorative vases carry the unique charm Sass and Belle are known for. A thoughtful gift for housewarmings, birthdays, or as a stylish addition to your own home décor collection.
description: Brighten your space with the Sass & Belle Yellow Glass Bud Vase Set, a beautiful trio of small decorative glass vases designed to infuse charm and character into your home. Each mini vase in the set has its own distinctive shape and embossed detail, perfect for creating eye-catching table decorations. Whether you're looking for a flower vase for a single bloom or a compact centrepiece, these glass vases deliver both style and function. Ideal for table decor, mantelpiece styling, or decorating shelves, this set of vases for flowers brings a playful and elegant aesthetic. Use them individually throughout your home or group them together for a coordinated look. The warm yellow hue adds a joyful touch, while the small glass vase size keeps things flexible for creative decorating. These vases also make an ideal housewarming gift or table decoration for weddings and events. Whether you’re a fan of Sass & Belle, searching for small vases for table decoration, or updating your vase collection, this set will suit your needs beautifully.
